title: IT Services HelpDesk Creation
description: The request is to create a HelpDesk system specifically for IT services.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: IT Services HelpDesk Creation (DEM-2026-0066)

Executive Summary:
This project proposes creating a dedicated HelpDesk system for IT services. Its goal is to centralize support requests and significantly enhance the overall efficiency of IT operations.

Business Value/Impact:
Implementation will streamline incident management, reducing resolution times and improving user satisfaction. This frees IT staff to focus on strategic initiatives, boosting organizational productivity.

Potential Risk Mitigation:
Medium risks include potential integration complexities and user adoption challenges. Mitigation involves a phased deployment, robust system testing, and comprehensive user training programs.
capacity_reasoning: Delivery team has 70% overall available capacity.
Constraint: Security Engineer has only 0 units available (requires 10).

Skill gap: Required skills System Design, Backend Development, API Design, Database Management, Authentication & Authorization, Frontend Development, Quality Assurance are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-08.
